title: Abuse queue update: spam & harassment bans
body: Today we processed high-severity items in the abuse queue. Two accounts were permanently banned for clear violations of our community guidelines: spam_wave_42 for posting repeated phishing links across multiple channels, and toxic_runner for sustained, targeted harassment of newcomers. Reports against long-term contributors, including core_maintainer, were reviewed and found to be false positives; no action was taken on trusted members. As always, we prioritize member safety while protecting trusted contributors from bad-faith mass reporting. If you believe a decision was made in error, please reply to this post or open a new report with additional context.
